name.full: Azure AI Foundry Model Availability Checker

description.short: Check which AI models are available in which Azure region and SKU
description.full: This agent helps account teams quickly find which Azure AI models (GPT-4o, GPT-5, DeepSeek, Llama, etc.) are available in which region and SKU variant (Standard, Provisioned PTU, Global Standard, Datazone, Batch) — covering Europe and worldwide. It automatically detects new models, region expansions, and retirements. Responds in German or English based on user language.
